title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Optimised search input performance by implementing client-side debouncing logic on keyword input fields, reducing redundant API calls and improving query response times by 30%
Redesigned search retrieval algorithm to support partial-string matching, enabling users to discover properties using incomplete street names or truncated keywords

Drove cross-functional quality assurance by authoring detailed functional specifications and UAT test cases within Jira, collaborating with business analysts and stakeholders to systematically validate edge-case filter states
